title: at the boundary of my body
quoteText: at the boundary of my body i am not met with danger, i am met with perfect aliveness

title: 独断与阅读
quoteText:
我很喜欢这样的独断，当然倘若仅仅满足于此，就会像那些趋炎附势的读书人一样，他们当面盛赞乔伊斯的《尤利西斯》而背后却从不会将它读完。

人们总会被某些自己肉身未曾经历之物，以及心智无法想象之物所震慑，但更好的对待方式，不是盲目的服从，却是睁大双眼跟从作者竭力体验他所体验的一切，并抵达想象的极限。

就像但丁跟从维吉尔漫游地狱又自炼狱缓缓上升一样。但倘若要进一步探问更高处，要阅读"天堂"，单靠导师是不够的，维吉尔需要让位于贝雅特丽齐，个人的探索需要让位于对爱的服从。

title: 寻获与失落 The Found and the Lost
creator: Ursula K. Le Guin

title: Interstellar nostalgia
creator: Christopher Nolan
description: Any excuse to get nostalgic about Interstellar, i'll take

title: Taro
creator: alt-J
description: The closing track of alt-J's Mercury Prize-winning debut 'An Awesome Wave' (2012), 'Taro' tells the intertwined story of war photographers Robert Capa and Gerda Taro through layered, cinematic indie rock. The song builds from a delicate folk opening to a sweeping orchestral climax, exemplifying the band's literary approach to songwriting.

title: Christmas Tree
creator: Shirazeh Houshiary
description: 2016/1993. Photograph courtesy Joe Humphreys, Tate Photography.

title: 所有的知识都是局部的
quoteText: 所有的知识都是局部的，所有的真理都是有限的，没有真理能使另一个真理变得不真实。所有知识都是全部知识的一部分。一旦你看到了更大的图景，你就不可能再回头把部分当作整体。

title: Organ Transplant System 'in Chaos'
creator: The New York Times
description: By Brian M. Rosenthal, Mark Hansen and Jeremy White, Feb. 26, 2025

title: Chet Faker - Talk Is Cheap
creator: Chet Faker
description: A hallmark of the 2010s indie electronic scene, "Talk Is Cheap" combines minimalist, downtempo electronic production with soulful, jazz-inflected vocals. The track, from the critically acclaimed album 'Built on Glass', cemented Chet Faker's (Nick Murphy's) reputation for crafting intimate and atmospheric soundscapes. Its use of a subtle saxophone line against a backdrop of sparse beats is a defining characteristic of its neo-soul and trip-hop influences.

title: 沙龍 · 陳奕迅 Eason Chan Duo Concert 2010
creator: Eason Chan
description: The DUO concert series, and its accompanying live album, represents a significant moment in Eason Chan's career, showcasing his artistic ambition to deconstruct and reinterpret his own and others' classic songs. Backed by the DUO band, the project emphasizes collaboration and musical duality, blending Cantopop sensibilities with elements of art pop, synth-pop, and rock. The arrangements are often experimental, offering a fresh perspective on familiar melodies and solidifying Chan's reputation as a forward-thinking artist within the Cantopop scene.

title: ∞→0
creator: Kumachan
description: An experimental electronic work by Japanese artist Kumachan that explores the conceptual journey from infinity to zero through ambient textures, drone, and minimalist sound design. The album sits at the intersection of sound art and electronic music, drawing from the Japanese tradition of Ma (negative space) and Mono no aware.

title: What's the Longest Trip You Can Make With a MetroCard?
creator: The New York Times
quoteText: But there's no harm in feeling wistful.

title: 反与正·婚礼集·夏
creator: Albert Camus
description: L'Envers et L'Endroit, Noces, L'Été

title: Den sista sången
creator: kent
description: The final single by Sweden's most celebrated rock band kent, from their farewell album 'Då som nu för alltid' (2016). The song encapsulates two decades of Swedish indie rock, blending synthesizers with emotional guitar work in a definitive goodbye that became a cultural moment in Scandinavian music.

title: Monument Valley
creator: ustwo games
description: Happy 11 years

title: MetroCard Retires
creator: The New York Times
description: i like how this is curated

title: Preliminary sketches for the Panama Puente de Vida Museo
creator: Frank O. Gehry
description: The Biomuseo (Museum of Biodiversity) in Panama City, designed by Frank Gehry, uses a fragmented, polychrome architectural language to narrate the geological story of the Isthmus of Panama. It is Gehry's first work in Latin America and a landmark of Deconstructivist architecture in the tropics.

title: Sora 2 launch day: me typing with spaghetti fingers
creator: Pinyan Zeng

title: Ensemble
creator: Jennie C. Jones
description: The Roof Garden Commission, The Met (2025)

title: Wild Geese
creator: Mary Oliver
quoteText: Whoever you are, no matter how lonely, / the world offers itself to your imagination, / calls to you like the wild geese, harsh and exciting — / over and over announcing your place / in the family of things.

title: NEOFVTVRO Studio 2.0
creator: J. Demsky & ARREL / HYPERSPACIO Studio
description: NEOFVTVRO Studio 2.0 is a conceptual architectural project by artist J. Demsky and ARREL/HYPERSPACIO Studio. It embodies the principles of Neo-Futurism, exploring the intersection of digital aesthetics, spatial dynamics, and speculative future environments. The project is a significant example of how contemporary artists and architects are using digital tools to push the boundaries of architectural design.

title: My reading notes, Herta Müller
creator: Pinyan Zeng
description: Der König verneigt sich und tötet (《每一句话语都坐着别的眼睛》), Oct 2025

title: Green auroras from ISS
creator: NASA / Don Pettit
quoteText: Green auroras stretching as far as the eye can see, almost mistakable for another planet rather than the blue Earth we call home.

title: Bad Habit
creator: Lucius Arthur
description: A track from Lucius Arthur's album 'A Violent Dichotomy', 'Bad Habit' is an indie rock song with a sense of longing and introspection, characteristic of the contemporary independent music scene.

title: Halo
creator: SOFTlab
description: An interactive public art installation at Google's Mountain View campus, SOFTlab's "Halo" is a cylindrical pavilion that draws inspiration from the intricate patterns of kaleidoscopes and the crystalline structures of geodes. Composed of over 200 stainless steel modules, its interior creates an immersive experience of shifting light and reflection, which is further enhanced by integrated LEDs at night. The project is a significant example of digital fabrication and parametric design in contemporary public art.

title: Spinning Off The Edge of the World
creator: Amir H. Fallah
description: Acrylic on canvas, 4' x 4'

title: 270 Park Avenue
creator: Foster + Partners
description: JPMorgan Chase's new global headquarters at 270 Park Avenue, designed by Foster + Partners, is the largest all-electric skyscraper in the world and a landmark of sustainable High-tech architecture. The 60-story tower replaces the 1961 Union Carbide Building and features a triple-height public lobby, setting a new standard for 21st-century corporate towers in Manhattan.

title: Rise
creator: Katia Lifshin
description: 19x24 cm, oil on mdf board. Israeli, b. 1993

title: Prelude in C Major, BWV 846
creator: J. S. Bach
description: The Prelude in C Major, BWV 846, is the first of 48 preludes and fugues in J.S. Bach's "The Well-Tempered Clavier," a seminal work of Western classical music. Published in two books (1722 and 1742), it was written to demonstrate the viability of well temperament, a system of tuning that allowed for playing in all 24 major and minor keys. This prelude, with its iconic arpeggiated chord progressions, serves as an introduction to the vast and complex world of the Well-Tempered Clavier.

title: Your aesthetics get better as you make mistakes
quoteText: Your aesthetics get better as you make mistakes.

title: Albert Camus quotes
creator: Albert Camus
quoteText:
Autumn is a second spring when every leaf is a flower.

A world that can be explained even with bad reasons is a familiar world.

title: Audrey Hepburn at the Chicago premiere of "My Fair Lady"
creator: Vivian Maier

title: The Dark Side of the Moon
creator: Pink Floyd
description: A concept album that explores themes of conflict, greed, the passage of time, and mental illness, The Dark Side of the Moon is one of the most acclaimed and commercially successful albums of all time, renowned for its philosophical lyrics, innovative sound effects, and musical experimentation.

title: 超越快乐原则 Jenseits des Lustprinzips
creator: Sigmund Freud

title: David Bowie quote
creator: David Bowie
quoteText: If you feel safe in the area you're working in, you're not working in the right area. Always go a little further into the water than you feel you're capable of being in. Go a little bit out of your depth. And when you don't feel that your feet are quite touching the bottom, you're just about in the right place to do something exciting.

title: Interview with Michael Moritz (1984)
creator: Steve Jobs
quoteText:
Ultimately it comes down to taste. It comes down to trying to expose yourself to the best things that humans have done and then try to bring those things in to what you're doing. I mean Picasso had a saying he said good artists copy great artists steal.

– Steve Jobs

title: A poem sent to a friend in 1974: "Don't waste your life."
creator: Steve Jobs

title: Renzo Piano Building Workshop
creator: Renzo Piano
description: Renzo Piano's own studio at Punta Nave, Genoa, is a masterwork of High-tech architecture that dissolves the boundary between building and landscape. Terraced into a hillside overlooking the Ligurian Sea, the glass-and-steel structure embodies Piano's philosophy of lightness and craft, serving as both workplace and manifesto for his architectural practice.

title: 万神殿第二季 Pantheon Season 2
creator: Craig Silverstein

title: 人生切割术第一季 Severance Season 1
creator: Dan Erickson

title: 赛博朋克：边缘行者 Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
creator: Studio Trigger

title: 皮埃尔·梅纳尔，《吉诃德》的作者
creator: Jorge Luis Borges
quoteText:
……历史所孕育的真理是时间的对手，事件的储存，过去的见证，现在的榜样和儆戒，未来的教训。

任何智力活动最终都是有用的。一种哲学理论开头是对宇宙的可信的描述；随着岁月的流逝，逐渐沦为哲学史的一章，甚至一节或者一个名称。在文学领域，那种最终趋于老朽的情况更为明显。

title: A Head Full of Dreams
creator: Coldplay
description: Coldplay's seventh studio album marked a stylistic departure toward a vibrant, pop-oriented sound, integrating electronic dance music and synth-pop into their established alternative rock framework. Produced by Rik Simpson and Stargate, it features collaborations with Beyoncé, Noel Gallagher, and Tove Lo.
